'''Arcel Mosbree''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senator/Legends|senatorial representative]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] who represented [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]] until after the [[Battle of Brentaal IV (Clone Wars)|Battle of Brentaal IV]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] and was taken into custody by Republic forces.

{{Char-stub}}
